description: The Clan Serino is a Camorra organization originating from Sarno, Salerno, Italy. Founded by Aniello Serino, known as 'O' Pope', it was influential for over twenty years and affiliated with the Nuova Famiglia. The clan engaged in extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and video poker businesses, and infiltrated local government. As of 2019, it remains active but weakened.
